title: Extras
description: Just a small optimised and lightweight with Create plus a few other mods (and the performance) featuring.
body:
This is a fairly lightweight and vanilla+ modpack highly focusing on the performance that is much better than unmodded vanilla while still providing a unique enough experience that it it has both elements of modded and vanilla Minecraft.

The pack's main highlight mod is Create as all of the other mods just enhance the experience without providing any major gameplay changes.

The pack features Tectonic as the world generation mod as it provides stunning terrain while still being even more vanilla friendly then even other similar mods like Terralith as Tectonic does not add new biomes and uses entirely vanilla biomes and only blocks found in vanilla generation whereas Terralith includes blocks such as slabs and blocks not found natively in the overworld, e.g. basalt and magma, which can sometimes minorly break game progression.



https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/natures-compass

https://github.com/isuewo/OverimaginedShaders
